code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Hubi haddii URL-ga bartilmaameed ee la bixiyay uu ku jiro domain-ka la bixiyay.
Haddii ay sidaas tahay, soo celi URL-ga bartilmaameed ee dib-u-diridda; haddii kale, u isticmaal URL-ka domain-ka ee dib-u-diridda.
Isticmaal protocol-ka https.

Tusaalooyin:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: String-ka URL-ga bartilmaameed.
@param domain: String-ka domain-ka, aan lahayn protocol.

@return String-ka URL-ga ee dib-u-diridda.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saaridiisa; qofka wacaya ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoraynta xusuusta; HA U BAARIN inaad samayso shaqadan maadaama ay la siisay, laakiin ugu horayn ugu dhawaaq si aad u isticmaasho.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, u soo saar adoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string ah.
Hikradaha: fuli amarada shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl khaas ah oo waqtiga ah ee loogu talagalay faylka qaabka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saariddiisa; qofka wacaya ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoraynta xusuusta; HA U BAARIN inaad samayso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waa la siiyay laakiin marka hore ugu dhawaaq si aad u isticmaasho.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar iyadoo loo adeegsanayo qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string.
Hikradaha: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaab dhismeedka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaab dhismeedka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaab dhismeedka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl khaas ah waqtiga ah ee faylka qaab dhismeedka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saariddiisa; qofka wacaya ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoraynta xusuusta; HA U BAARIN inaad samayso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waa la siiyay laakiin marka hore ugu dhawaaq si aad u isticmaasho.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar iyadoo loo adeegsanayo qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string.
Hikradaha: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaab-dhismeedka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaab-dhismeedka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaab-dhismeedka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl oo khaas ah waqtiga ah ee faylka qaab-dhismeedka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saariddiisa; qofka wacaya ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoraynta xusuusta; HA U BAARIN inaad samayso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waa la siiyay laakiin marka hore ugu dhawaaq si aad u isticmaasho.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar iyadoo loo adeegsanayo qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string.
Hints: fuli amarada shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo furaha DSA gaarka ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo kaydiyo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl khaas ah waqtiga ah ee faylka qaabka DSA.
@return Furaha DSA gaarka ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

shaqada si loo fuliyo amar shell ah oo loo qabto soo saaridiisa; qofka wacaya ayaa mas'uul ka ah xoraynta xusuusta; HA U BAHAANIN inaad samayso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waxaa la siiyay laakiin marka hore ugu dhawaaq si aad u isticmaasho.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string.
Hikradaha: fuli amarada shell si aad u soo saarto faylka param DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo param-ka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo param-ka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl khaas ah waqtiga ah faylka param DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Xogta XML ee la siiyay fasaad oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee loogu talagalay magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah. Qaabka xogta XML wuxuu noqon doonaa sidan:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Waxaan u dhisaynaa soo jeedinta XPath oo aan u isticmaalaynaa raadinta.

@param xml_data Xogta XML ee ay ku jiraan macluumaadka ardayga.
@param username Magaca isticmaalaha ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Tixraac (pointer) uu ku jiro qaabka StudentInfo haddii ardayga la helo. Hadday kale, wuxuu soo celinayaa NULL.

Xogta XML ee la siiyay firi oo soo celi macluumaadka ardayga ee loogu talagalay magaca isticmaalaha iyo erayga sirta ah. Qaabka xogta XML wuxuu noqon doonaa sidan:
